title: Announcement Workflows
objective: Prepare, validate, and publish announcements with the correct audience and delivery channel.

steps.description: Determine whether the announcement is governance-only, public-facing, donor-facing, or mixed.
Confirm role scope, list inclusion, suppression handling, and board-only constraints.
Check templates, attachments, linked pages, and embedded forms before publication.
Produce one or more bounded publication proposals with scheduled timing and approval gates.

escalation_rules: Treat audience leakage as high severity.
Escalate to permission_diagnostics when visibility or publish controls are missing.
Escalate to system_health_diagnostics when queue or delivery events are inconsistent.
